dialog.title: Generate Mermaid diagram
dialog.description: Generate a diagram from the selected text.

flowchart.name: Flowchart
flowchart.example:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Condition}
    B -->|Yes| C[Action]
    B -->|No| D[End]

sequence.name: Sequence
sequence.example:
sequenceDiagram
    participant A as User
    participant B as System
    A->>B: Request
    B-->>A: Response

classDiagram.name: Class diagram

stateDiagram.name: State diagram
stateDiagram.example:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Running: start
    Running --> Done: finish
    Done --> [*]

erDiagram.name: ER diagram
erDiagram.example:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ ITEM : contains
    USER {
        int id
        string name
    }

gantt.name: Gantt
gantt.example:
gantt
    title Project plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Phase1
    Task1 :a1, 2024-01-01, 7d
    Task2 :after a1, 5d

mindmap.name: Mindmap
mindmap.example:
mindmap
  root((Center theme))
    Topic1
      Sub1
      Sub2
    Topic2
      Sub3

generatorPrompt:
You are a Mermaid diagram expert.
Read the text and output valid Mermaid for the selected diagram type(s).

## Diagram types
{{diagramTypes}}

## Source text
__ZEDI_MERMAID_SOURCE__

## Output rules
1. Output Mermaid code only, syntactically valid
2. Do not wrap the output in code fences (```)
3. You may use labels in the user’s language
4. Keep the diagram small and readable
5. No prose—Mermaid only

## Output
Emit Mermaid code only.
